zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Eleanor Acton於1424年7月25日出生在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克時，她的父親Sir Lawrence Acton21歲，母親Matilda de Echingham17歲。她於大約1454年與Ralph Percy在英國越可爾萊康費爾德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1498年8月22日在英國越可爾萊康費爾德享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Eleanor Acton于1424年7月25日出生在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克时，她的父亲Sir Lawrence Acton21岁，母亲Matilda de Echingham17岁。她于大约1454年与Ralph Percy在英国越可爾萊康費爾德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1498年8月22日在英国越可爾萊康費爾德享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Acton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places, especially in Shropshire and adjacent counties, named Acton. Generally, these are from Old English āc ‘oak’ + tūn ‘settlement’. In Ireland the surname has been established in Connacht since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Eleanor Acton was born on 25 July 1424, in Alnwick, Northumberland, England, her father, Sir Lawrence Acton, was 21 and her mother, Matilda de Echingham, was 17. She married Ralph Percy about 1454, in Leconfield, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 22 August 1498, in Leconfield, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 74.

fr.Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, En: Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Eleanor Acton est née le 25 juillet 1424, à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Lawrence Acton, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Matilda d’Echingham, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph Percy environ 1454, à Leconfield, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 22 août 1498, à Leconfield, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, En: Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Eleanor Acton am 25. Juli 1424 in Alnwick, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Lawrence Acton 21 und ihre Mutter Matilda de Echingham 17. Sie hat um 1454 in Leconfield, Yorkshire, England Ralph Percy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 22. August 1498 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Leconfield, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Eleanor Acton è nata il il 25 luglio 1424 nel Alnwick, Northumberland, England, sua padre, Sir Lawrence Acton, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Matilda de Echingham, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Ralph Percy circa 1454, nel Leconfield, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 22 agosto 1498, nel Leconfield, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor Actonが1424年7月25日にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックで生まれた時，父Sir Lawrence Actonは21歳，母Matilda de Echinghamは17歳であった。約1454年にイギリスヨークシュアイアレコンフィールドでRalph Percyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1498年8月22日にイギリスヨークシュアイアレコンフィールドで74歳で死去した。

ko.Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, En: 영국 노르스벌랜드 악턴 앤드 드 프턴
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor Acton(이)가 1424년 7월 25일 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Lawrence Acton(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda de Echingham(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 대략 1454년 영국 요르크실르 렉필드에서 Ralph Percy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1498년 8월 22일 영국 요르크실르 렉필드에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, En: Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Eleanor Acton nasceu em 25 de julho de 1424, em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Lawrence Acton, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Matilda de Echingham, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph Percy aproximadamente 1454, em Leconfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 22 de agosto de 1498, em Leconfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 74 anos.

ru.Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, En: актон анд олд фелтон, нортумбирланд, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Eleanor Acton родилась 25 июля 1424 г. в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Lawrence Acton было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Echingham, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Percy около 1454 г. в местности леконфиелд, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 22 августа 1498 г. в местности леконфиелд, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 74 лет.

Se casó con Ralph Percy aproximadamente 1454, en Leconfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija.
